buffet.title: A Natural Beauty
buffet.subtitle: That blends with warmth and refinement.

card.title: A Romantic and Enchanting Atmosphere
card.paragraph1: Imagine celebrating love in a setting where the sea meets the sky, creating an atmosphere that seems hand-painted. At Espelho das Águas, in Búzios, every detail becomes poetry: the breeze, the sound of the waves, and the golden light that embraces the surroundings at sunset.
card.paragraph2: With light architecture, elegant design and a carefully planned structure, the space offers everything you need to live an unforgettable day. Every angle was designed to highlight the surrounding nature, creating a romantic, relaxed and absolutely enchanting atmosphere.
card.paragraph3: Located in one of the most charming regions of Búzios, Espelho das Águas provides a unique experience, where the natural beauty of the peninsula blends with the warmth and refinement of the space. It is the ideal place for those who want an outdoor wedding with the beach charm and sophistication that only Búzios can offer.
card.paragraph4: And the best part: having your wedding at Espelho das Águas is more possible than you imagine. Leco Biagioni's office has the expertise and sensitivity needed to transform this paradise setting into the perfect stage for your big day — with impeccable, engaging and meaningful production.

about.title: About Us
about.name: Leco Biagioni
about.description: Our advisory and ceremonial team, led by Leco Biagioni, is here to transform your wedding into a unique and unforgettable experience. With years of experience and an eye for detail, we ensure that every moment is perfect. Leco Biagioni works with the best suppliers in the market, and the couple will have their advisory from start to finish.

packages.title: All-Inclusive Packages
packages.subtitle: Our proposal includes all essential pillars for a successful wedding:

form.title: We take care of all the details
form.subtitle: Let our team of specialists take care of all the details so you can enjoy every moment with your friends and family. Contact us and let's start planning your dream wedding!
